features.title: Claude-Code pi-workflows runner
acceptance_criteria: executeWorkflow / parseWorkflowSpec / findIncompleteRun / createAgentLoader reachable via file:// loader from dist/

features.title: Workflow bridge scripts: render_from_substrate.py + apply_from_substrate.py
acceptance_criteria: render_from_substrate.py emits the per-spec prompt JSON from .workshopping
apply_from_substrate.py parser-gates a response and writes a versioned draft

features.title: 14-spec pi-workflow YAML (per WORKSHOPPING-WORKFLOW-SPEC)
features.description: Per WORKSHOPPING-WORKFLOW-SPEC: per-spec render->call->apply with draft_path threading.
acceptance_criteria: YAML drives all 14 specs in dependency order
commands emit JSON; agent input is an object {prompt:…}

features.title: First run + per-spec quality iteration -> promotion-ready draft (DISC-26 closure)
features.description: Execute the sequence end-to-end and iterate per-spec quality to a promotion-ready whole-plan draft, closing DISC-26.
acceptance_criteria: 14-spec sequence runs headless against the Chiway dev-DB; run dir captured
per-spec quality evaluation yields a promotion-ready whole-plan draft
